name: agno-agent
description: AI data agent that answers natural language questions about your data via an Agno AgentOS agent, providing insights not just query results.

api_url.label: AgentOS API Base URL
api_url.help_text: Base URL of your Agno AgentOS API, including any mount prefix (e.g. https://agno.example.com/api)

api_token.label: API Token
api_token.help_text: Bearer token, if your AgentOS deployment requires authentication

agent_id.label: Agent ID
agent_id.help_text: ID of the AgentOS agent to query (e.g. 'my-agent')

ask_agent.description: Ask a natural language question about your data and get insights back from the agent.

query.label: Query
query.help_text: Natural language question about the database (e.g. 'How many active users do we have?')
